positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a soaring mythical griffin silhouetted against a vibrant, stylized sunrise sky. The griffin is rendered with elegant, powerful lines, wings spread wide, capturing a moment of effortless flight. The background features stylized mountain peaks and gentle, swirling clouds in gradients of deep indigo, soft peach, and radiant gold. Composition must be central, utilizing negative space effectively to highlight the silhouette of the griffin. Highly detailed line art influence, modern flat graphic design style, suitable for apparel print, high contrast, clean vector aesthetics. Golden ratio composition.
